description: This file defines the data model for outage incidents in a smart outage management platform, including the Outage class, OutageStatus enum, and associated extension methods for label representation and database conversion.

classes.name: Outage
classes.description: Immutable data class representing an outage with properties such as id, title, location, affected customers, status, ETA, report time, and optional notes and crew assignments.

methods.name: copyWith
methods.description: Creates a copy of the Outage object with specified fields replaced by new values.

methods.name: label (getter in OutageStatusX)
methods.description: Returns a human-readable label for the outage status.

methods.name: fromDb
methods.description: Converts a string database value into an OutageStatus enum.

methods.name: toDb
methods.description: Converts an OutageStatus enum to its string database representation.
